mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS activeUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts) AS totalPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED') AS publishedPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 'ARCHIVED') AS archivedPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE featured = 1) AS featuredPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS pendingReports, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status <> 'PENDING') AS processedReports
mapper.sql: p.post_id AS postId, p.author_id AS authorId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS authorName, pi.title AS title, pi.summary AS summary, pi.content AS content, pi.language_code AS languageCode, c.category_code AS categoryCode, p.status AS status, p.featured AS featured, p.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.hot_score AS hotScore, p.created_time AS createdTime, p.updated_time AS updatedTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.author_id JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = p.post_id AND pi.language_code = p.original_language WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports ( post_id, reporter_id, reason, status, ai_risk_level, ai_suggestion ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason}, 'PENDING', #{aiRiskLevel}, #{aiSuggestion} )
mapper.sql: r.report_id AS reportId, r.post_id AS postId, pi.title AS postTitle, p.status AS postStatus, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, COALESCE(NULLIF(reporter.display_name, ''), reporter.username) AS reporterName, r.reason AS reason, r.status AS status, r.ai_risk_level AS aiRiskLevel, r.ai_suggestion AS aiSuggestion, r.processed_by AS processedBy, COALESCE(NULLIF(processor.display_name, ''), processor.username) AS processedByName, r.processed_time AS processedTime, r.created_time AS createdTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM reports r JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = r.post_id JOIN users reporter ON reporter.user_id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN users processor ON processor.user_id = r.processed_by LEFT JOIN post_i18n pi ON pi.post_id = p.post_id AND pi.language_code = p.original_language WHERE r.report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status = #{status}, processed_by = #{processedBy}, processed_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.sql: u.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS displayName, u.email AS email, u.role AS role, u.status AS status, u.community_level AS communityLevel, u.experience_points AS experiencePoints, u.reputation_score AS reputationScore, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.user_id = u.user_id AND c.status = 'VISIBLE') AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorites f WHERE f.user_id = u.user_id) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows f WHERE f.following_id = u.user_id AND f.status = 'ACTIVE') AS followerCount, u.created_time AS createdTime
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS displayName, u.email AS email, u.role AS role, u.status AS status, u.bio AS bio, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.banner_url AS bannerUrl, u.community_level AS communityLevel, u.experience_points AS experiencePoints, u.last_login_reward_date AS lastLoginRewardDate, u.reputation_score AS reputationScore, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED') AS publishedPostCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id AND p.status = 'ARCHIVED') AS archivedPostCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.user_id = u.user_id AND c.status = 'VISIBLE') AS commentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes l WHERE l.user_id = u.user_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorites f WHERE f.user_id = u.user_id) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_collections fc WHERE fc.user_id = u.user_id) AS collectionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_view_history vh WHERE vh.user_id = u.user_id) AS historyCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows f WHERE f.following_id = u.user_id AND f.status = 'ACTIVE') AS followerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows f WHERE f.follower_id = u.user_id AND f.status = 'ACTIVE') AS followingCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friendships fs WHERE fs.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (fs.user_low_id = u.user_id OR fs.user_high_id = u.user_id)) AS friendCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_requests fr WHERE fr.addressee_id = u.user_id AND fr.status = 'PENDING') AS incomingFriendRequestCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_requests fr WHERE fr.requester_id = u.user_id AND fr.status = 'PENDING') AS outgoingFriendRequestCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_messages fm WHERE fm.sender_id = u.user_id) AS sentMessageCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_messages fm WHERE fm.receiver_id = u.user_id) AS receivedMessageCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_requests h WHERE h.user_id = u.user_id) AS helpRequestCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_answers ha WHERE ha.user_id = u.user_id AND ha.status = 'VISIBLE') AS helpAnswerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM help_answers ha WHERE ha.user_id = u.user_id AND ha.status = 'VISIBLE' AND ha.is_accepted = 1) AS acceptedAnswerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r WHERE r.reporter_id = u.user_id) AS reportCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports r JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = r.post_id WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id) AS reportedPostCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uploaded_files uf WHERE uf.user_id = u.user_id AND uf.status = 'ACTIVE') AS uploadCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_logs al WHERE al.user_id = u.user_id) AS aiCallCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_logs al WHERE al.user_id = u.user_id AND al.success = 1) AS aiSuccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_records vr WHERE vr.user_id = u.user_id) AS voiceRecordCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tokens ut WHERE ut.user_id = u.user_id AND ut.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ut.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS activeTokenCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_experience_logs el WHERE el.user_id = u.user_id) AS experienceLogCount, (SELECT MAX(p.created_time) FROM posts p WHERE p.author_id = u.user_id) AS lastPostTime, (SELECT MAX(c.created_time) FROM comments c WHERE c.user_id = u.user_id AND c.status = 'VISIBLE') AS lastCommentTime, (SELECT MAX(help_activity.activity_time) FROM ( SELECT h.user_id AS user_id, h.created_time AS activity_time FROM help_requests h UNION ALL SELECT ha.user_id AS user_id, ha.created_time AS activity_time FROM help_answers ha WHERE ha.status = 'VISIBLE' ) help_activity WHERE help_activity.user_id = u.user_id) AS lastHelpTime, (SELECT MAX(al.created_time) FROM ai_logs al WHERE al.user_id = u.user_id) AS lastAiCallTime, (SELECT MAX(vr.created_time) FROM voice_records vr WHERE vr.user_id = u.user_id) AS lastVoiceTime, u.created_time AS createdTime, u.updated_time AS updatedTime FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_audit_logs ( admin_id, target_type, target_id, action_type, remark ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{actionType}, #{remark} )
